title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 15 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 3.17. the main contract I2405 closed 933.Traders ship according to market conditions；Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 997-1018 yuan/mt; decreased 0-21 yuan/mt from last Friday.
